compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A hand places a raw meat cut with a white fat rim into a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable stove, joining three other sizzling pieces in hot oil. The hand arranges the fourth chop in the top right area to fill the gap. [4-10] The scene shifts to a wooden cutting board on a wooden table, displaying four raw meat cuts arranged in a square. A hand sprinkles white seasoning granules over the pink surfaces. Then, a black cylindrical grinder is used to grind dark seasoning onto the chops. [10-12] Once seasoning is complete, the hand flips the bottom-left piece of meat over on the board, exposing the unseasoned side, while the other three pieces remain in place. Hands flip four raw meat cuts on a light wooden board to expose pink surfaces. White salt granules are sprinkled over the chops, followed by ground black pepper from a black grinder. Hands adjust the position of the seasoned meat. The scene cuts to a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable burner. A hand holds a small white bowl containing a yellow butter cube. A yellow spatula maneuvers chunks of yellow butter across the hot pan

[44-48] Three golden-brown meat chops are removed from the grey speckled frying pan, leaving one piece cooking in the top left before yellow tongs lift the final chop out, leaving only bubbling browned fat.
[48-52] Hands pour diced white onions from a clear glass bowl into the center of the hot pan, followed by minced yellow-white garlic chunks poured from a small white bowl onto the onions.
[52-60] A yellow spatula stirs the central pile of onions and garlic, mixing them into the browned oil. The ingredients spread across the pan bottom, cooking and turning a deeper golden-brown color as they caramelize on the white stove burner.

[60-68] A yellow spatula stirs a diced onion and garlic mixture within a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable stove. The ingredients are pushed across the bottom, appearing increasingly golden-brown and caramelized as they cook in bubbling residual fat. [68-70] Hands hold a clear glass bowl containing sliced white mushrooms over the pan. The mushrooms are poured onto the caramelized onion and garlic mixture, sitting on top of the brown base. [70-76] The yellow spatula actively stirs the sliced white mushrooms into the brown caramelized onion mixture. The mushrooms are pushed around the hot surface, folding into the dark golden-brown onion mixture and becoming coated in the oil and caramelized bits.

[76-86] A yellow spatula stirs sliced white mushrooms mixed with caramelized onions in a grey speckled pan on a white portable stove, tossing ingredients across the hot surface for even cooking. [86-88] A hand pours fine white powder from a small white bowl onto the center of the sautéed mixture, creating a white mound. [88-92] The yellow spatula mixes the white powder into the mushroom and onion mixture, folding the dry ingredient into the base until it integrates and coats the vegetables.

[92-98] A hand tilts a clear glass bowl, pouring a steady stream of reddish-orange liquid into the grey speckled frying pan. The liquid cascades over the sautéed mushroom and onion mixture, pooling at the bottom and rising to submerge the ingredients on the white stove. [98-106] A yellow spatula enters the pan filled with the reddish-orange broth and mushrooms. The utensil stirs the liquid mixture, agitating the mushrooms and onions within the broth on the white portable stove. The stirring action blends the liquid with the sautéed ingredients as the sauce bubbles gently.

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] A hand places a raw meat cut with a white fat rim into a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable stove, joining three other sizzling pieces in hot oil. The hand arranges the fourth chop in the top right area to fill the gap. [4-10] The scene shifts to a wooden cutting board on a wooden table, displaying four raw meat cuts arranged in a square. A hand sprinkles white seasoning granules over the pink surfaces. Then, a black cylindrical grinder is used to grind dark seasoning onto the chops. [10-12] Once seasoning is complete, the hand flips the bottom-left piece of meat over on the board, exposing the unseasoned side, while the other three pieces remain in place. Hands flip four raw meat cuts on a light wooden board to expose pink surfaces. White salt granules are sprinkled over the chops, followed by ground black pepper from a black grinder. Hands adjust the position of the seasoned meat. The scene cuts to a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable burner. A hand holds a small white bowl containing a yellow butter cube. A yellow spatula maneuvers chunks of yellow butter across the hot pan

Throughout the interval, a yellow spatula stirs a simmering reddish-brown liquid containing sliced mushrooms and onions within a grey speckled frying pan on a white portable stove. The sauce bubbles gently as the utensil sweeps through the mixture, agitating the contents and pushing the solid ingredients around the center. This continuous motion keeps the mushrooms and onions suspended and evenly distributed within the hot broth. Small bubbles rise consistently to the surface, indicating a steady simmer, while the spatula maintains the blend of liquid and solid components for a uniform texture.
